description: Email IMAP/SMTP MCP server: iCloud, Gmail, Yahoo, Outlook, and custom IMAP providers
name: io.github.mindstone/mcp-server-email-imap

environmentVariables.description: Provider — icloud, gmail, yahoo, outlook, or custom (auto-detected from email domain if unset)
environmentVariables.name: EMAIL_IMAP_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to opt into cleartext IMAP/SMTP (strongly discouraged)
environmentVariables.name: EMAIL_IMAP_ALLOW_PLAINTEXT

environmentVariables.description: Safety cap: maximum combined To+CC+BCC recipients per email_send call. Defaults to 25; raising bypasses spam-prevention guardrails against prompt-injection-driven mass sends.
environmentVariables.name: EMAIL_IMAP_MAX_RECIPIENTS

environmentVariables.description: Safety cap: maximum email_send calls per rolling window. Defaults to 50; protects against runaway sends when injection content escapes the LLM's intent.
environmentVariables.name: EMAIL_IMAP_RATE_LIMIT_PER_HOUR

environmentVariables.description: Sliding-window length for the rate limit (ms)
environmentVariables.name: EMAIL_IMAP_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS

title: Email (IMAP/SMTP)
